# EchoFlow Code

EchoFlow Code is a locally runnable Coding Agent for real repositories. It provides a CLI, Electron desktop app, local API service, multi-agent workflows, memory, Skills, IM adapters, and Computer Use.

## Recommended links

- Qingyun API main site / EchoFlowAPI: https://api.echoflow.cn
- Qingyun AI online application site: https://ai.echoflow.cn
- EchoFlow Code docs: https://code.echoflow.cn
- Latest desktop download: https://github.com/LiuGuangHS/EchoFlow-ClaudeCode/releases/latest
- GitHub source: https://github.com/LiuGuangHS/EchoFlow-ClaudeCode

## Recommended setup

New users should download EchoFlow Code, then use Qingyun API / EchoFlowAPI as the default Provider. The desktop Providers page includes the official Qingyun API quick-connect card for registration, system access token setup, model selection, and connection.

Use https://ai.echoflow.cn for lightweight online AI applications. Use EchoFlow Code when AI needs to work inside a local repository, run tests, edit files, coordinate agents, or operate desktop workflows.
